data.title: American Bar Association selects Atticus for Louis M. Brown Award for Legal Access. Atticus lauded for innovative approach.
data.description: In the week of December 12, 2025, Atticus, identified as a hybrid tech firm and public-interest legal organization, was granted the prestigious 2025 Louis M. Brown Award for Legal Access by the American Bar Association. The organization commended Atticus for its exceptional approach in assisting in the expansion of legal access.

data.title: Alphabet stock down due to antitrust probe. Piper Sandler raises price target to $365. Earn $500 monthly from dividends.
data.description: Alphabet Inc's (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) shares saw a decrease in closing price on Thursday. The European Commission has initiated an antitrust probe against Google for utilizing content from publishers and creators to train its AI models. Piper Sandler analyst Thomas Champion, in a recent update, maintained an Overweight rating on Alphabet and increased the price target from $330 to $365. Amidst the growing interest in Alphabet, investors are considering potential gains from the company's dividends. Currently, Alphabet offers an annual dividend yield of 0.27%, translating to a quarterly dividend payment of 21 cents per share (84 cents annually). For those aiming to earn $500 monthly from Alphabet, the path begins with the yearly target. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Texas architect Jeff Garnett wins big at AIA Fort Worth Design Awards, extending winning streak to 3 years. 2 out of 7 honors.
data.description: Architect Jeff Garnett from Texas Modern managed to extend his winning streak to three years by showcasing design-forward and place-driven work at the Elk Edge Retreat and Animal Sanctuary in Fort Worth, Texas. This news comes after Garnett secured two out of seven prestigious awards during the recent American design competition. The winning streak highlights his consistent success in the industry, solidifying his reputation as a prominent figure in modern architecture.

data.title: Hero Medical Technologies received Other Transaction Agreement (OTA) from MTEC to enhance machine learning and wearables for field triage. Vision to personalize emergency monitoring using facial analytics.
data.description: Leveraging facial analytics along with wearables has inspired Hero Medical to personalize and speed up emergency patient monitoring. The company's comprehensive approach aims to enhance dynamic triage by using data collected from the head and face. This innovative method is set to revolutionize emergency care by providing detailed insights and timely assistance, potentially saving countless lives in critical situations.

data.title: GL Homes offers 55+ homebuyers three-day stays to experience Valencia lifestyle in Naples, Fort Myers, and Tampa Bay area.
data.description: Experience the vibrant Valencia lifestyle in Naples, Fort Myers, and the greater Tampa Bay area with newly launched three-day visits. GL Homes, a leading Florida-based homebuilder, is offering Stay and Play opportunities for interested individuals. These visits allow guests to immerse themselves in the local culture and amenities. Hailing from Naples, the program offers a comprehensive glimpse into the lifestyle in these areas.

data.title: Hospitality Capital Partners buys Sonesta hotels for $72M in Arizona, boosts portfolio growth.
data.description: Occupational ownership group HCP, backed by National Property Advisors, has recently bolstered its presence in key Arizona markets with the purchase of five hotels in Phoenix. This move reflects HCP's dedication to sustainable growth, as the acquisition includes assets totaling [insert number] rooms and underscores the company's strategic investment vision for the future.

data.title: Greenberg Traurig named in 2026 Chambers Asia-Pacific Guide with 13 attorneys listed. Recognized for Real Estate in Japan and Corporate/M&A in Singapore.
data.description: Thirteen lawyers affiliated with the prominent international legal firm, Greenberg Traurig, have been acknowledged in the Chambers Asia-Pacific Guide for the year 2026. The firm received acclaim for its expertise in the Real Estate sector in Japan and was also recognized as highly regarded in the Corporate/M&A: International category in Singapore. The accolades were announced in Tokyo on December 11, 2025.

data.title: Powerside launches PowerXAct low voltage active filter to enhance power quality in compact design. SAINT-LAURENT, QC. Dec. 11, 2025.
data.description: Powerside, a prominent global advanced power quality solutions provider, revealed the release of its latest active harmonic filter in SAINT-LAURENT, QC on December 11, 2025. This innovative filter, which enhances power quality, is designed to be both compact and powerful, building upon the strengths of its predecessor PowerAct. The new filter is set to make a significant impact with its improved functionality.

data.title: JMGO O2S Ultra tri-laser projector, with MALC™ 3.0 Optical System, true 4K resolution, on sale after IFA 2025 unveiling.
data.description: JMGO has recently launched the O2S Ultra, their latest ultra-short-throw tri-laser projector, after introducing it at IFA 2025. This cutting-edge projector features the MALC™ 3.0 Tri-Laser Optical System and provides true 4K resolution. It guarantees an immersive home cinema experience in a sleek and compact design.

data.title: Blue KC to affiliate with Highmark Inc, nation's fifth largest BCBs plan. Important move in health insurance sector.
data.description: Today, Blue Cross and Blue Shield of Kansas City, a prominent not-for-profit health insurer in the Kansas City area, disclosed its intention to form an affiliation with Highmark Inc., one of the largest not-for-profit health insurers in the United States and the fifth largest Blue Cross and Blue Shield plan in the nation. This partnership marks a significant development in the healthcare industry.

data.title: ILTexas is the first K-12 school to get the U.S-China Relations Award, focusing on global education for 26,000 students.
data.description: ILTexas, based in Garland, Texas, has recently gained national recognition for its distinct focus on nurturing globally competent, trilingual student leaders. The school network, International Leadership of Texas (ILTexas), operates as a tuition-free public charter, catering to over 26,000 students from kindergarten to 12th grade. This achievement underscores ILTexas' commitment to developing students who are proficient in three languages and well-prepared to succeed on a global scale.

data.title: Field Materials AI introduces Construction Material Pricing Intelligence module providing updated prices for contractor purchases.
data.description: A new module has been introduced into the Field Materials AI construction procurement software suite, seamlessly integrating and offering current prices for all materials and equipment purchased by contractors annually. This development was revealed in Charlotte, N.C. on December 11, 2025.

data.title: Bitcoin rises to $92,000 as Congress seeks SEC approval for 401(k) investment. $77.3M outflows for Bitcoin ETFs, $42.4M for Ethereum ETFs.
data.description: Bitcoin has surged to $92,000 as there are discussions in Congress about the SEC potentially approving the inclusion of Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies in 401(k) retirement plans. Bitcoin ETFs experienced net outflows of $77.3 million on Thursday, while Ethereum ETFs saw net outflows of $42.4 million. The current cryptocurrency prices are as follows: Bitcoin (BTC) at $92,458.23, Ethereum (ETH) at $3,243.94, Solana (SOL) at $138.32, and XRP at $2.03. Market analyst Michael van de Poppe highlighted the continued high volatility of Bitcoin. For the full story, visit a financial news website.

GERMANY'S MERZ SAYS ELECTRIC MOBILITY WILL BE "MAIN ROAD" OF TECHNOLOGY AND WILL BE SUPPORTED, BUT OTHER TECHNOLOGIES WILL BE ALLOWED

data.title: BULGOLD finishes diamond drilling on Lutila Gold Project in Central Slovakia, spanning 32.2km² for gold deposits.
data.description: In Toronto on December 12, 2025, BULGOLD Inc. (TSXV: ZLTO) disclosed the completion of exploration diamond drilling on the Lutila Gold Project in Central Slovakia. The project spans 32.2km² and shows promise for quartz-adularia, low-sulfidation epithermal gold mineralisation.

data.title: New York requires AI transparency in ads as SAG-AFTRA advocates for No Fakes Act nationwide.
data.description: Legislation in New York state now requires disclosure of AI involvement in advertising campaigns. Additionally, the Screen Actors Guild - American Federation of Television and Radio Artists (SAG-AFTRA) is pushing for the No Fakes Act to be implemented nationwide to protect against fraudulent practices. This development highlights the growing importance of transparency in the use of AI in advertising and the need for stronger regulations to combat fake content.
